scenarios.title: Data Orchestration and Parallel Computing
scenarios.when_to_read: Workflow engines, DAGs, assets, Snakefiles, lazy/parallel task graphs, distributed arrays/dataframes, feature stores, cloud compute orchestration, and production data pipelines.
scenarios.role: Use PyTorch Geometric to build graph data, loaders, GNN models, heterogeneous workflows, explainers, scalable/distributed jobs, and GraphGym experiments.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `pytorch-geometric` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: data and datasets, explainability, gnn modeling, graphgym experiments, heterogeneous graphs, and 2 other focused workflows.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `pytorch-geometric` when the request names `pytorch-geometric`, centers on Use PyTorch Geometric to build graph data, loaders, GNN models, heterogeneous workflows, explainers, scalable/distributed jobs, and GraphGym experiments, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in data orchestration and parallel computing. Then route to data and datasets, explainability, gnn modeling, or graphgym experiments when those focused workflows match.
